name: Reasonable Cause Defense for Erroneous Refund Claims

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who filed an erroneous claim for refund or credit but can demonstrate a reasonable basis/cause for the position taken, provided it was not a noneconomic substance transaction.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoid a 20% penalty on excessive refund or credit claims for income or employment taxes by showing the claim had a reasonable cause.
